name: Lemon-Poppy Seed Biscotti & 2 Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter or margarine with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for about 30 seconds or until softened.
2. Add sugar, shredded lemon peel, poppy seeds, baking powder, and baking soda; mix until combined.
3. Add eggs; mix until combined.
4. Beat in as much of the flour as possible using the electric mixer.
5. Using a wooden spoon, stir in any remaining flour.
6. Divide dough into two portions.
7. Shape each portion into two 9x1 1/2-inch rolls on an ungreased cookie sheet, flattening slightly.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool on the cookie sheet on a wire rack for 1 hour.
10. Cut each roll crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices.
11. Arrange the slices flat about 4 inches apart on the cooled cookie sheet.
12. Bake at 325°F for an additional 8 minutes or until surfaces are crisp and light brown.
13. Remove biscotti from the cookie sheet; cool on a wire rack.
Variations:
ALMOND BRICKLE BISCIOTTI: Prepare Lemon-Poppy Seed Biscotti as directed, except substitute brown sugar for the sugar. Omit lemon peel and poppy seed. Stir in 1 cup almond brickle pieces after the flour. Continue shaping and baking as directed.
ORANGE-CRANBERRY BISCIOTTI: Prepare Lemon-Poppy Seed Biscotti as directed, except substitute finely shredded orange peel for the lemon peel. Omit poppy seed. Stir in 1/2 cup finely chopped dried cranberries or diced tart red cherries after adding the flour. Continue shaping and baking as directed.
